expectations.text: Letter includes tenant name (Sarah Chen) and property address (123 Oak Street)
Current rent ($1,800) and new rent ($1,900) are both stated
Tone is professional but not cold - follows the real estate template pattern
expectations.evidence: Uses markdown bold formatting which violates plain-text email rule. Tone is adequate but formal rather than warm/approachable per the skill's tenant guidelines. No empathy or rapport.
